prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model, a common stochastic model for stock prices. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted price distribution in 18 days. This is calculated from the current price ($115.02) assuming an annualized drift (expected return) of 7% and an annualized volatility of 25%. The confidence intervals are derived from the same model, using these parameters, and standard Z-scores for each confidence level (0.674 for 50%, 1.282 for 80%, 1.645 for 90%). These values represent the range within which the stock price is expected to fall with the given probability in 18 trading days.
